name: pulsedeck
description: Customizable Windows PC widget dashboard — system vitals, network, crypto, stocks & more
author: PulseDeck contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @pulsedeck/server" "npm run dev -w @pulsedeck/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build && npm run dev -w @pulsedeck/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pulsedeck/shared && npm run build -w @pulsedeck/server && npm run build -w @pulsedeck/web && npm run build -w @pulsedeck/desktop && npm run bundle:server
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @pulsedeck/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pulsedeck/shared && npm run typecheck -w @pulsedeck/server && npm run typecheck -w @pulsedeck/web && npm run typecheck -w @pulsedeck/desktop
